subject: Data Protection Query - Project Data
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

For my KV6003 project, I'm generating synthetic emails but I want to make sure I'm compliant with data protection regulations. Even though the data is AI-generated, do I still need to complete a Data Protection Impact Assessment? The ethics page on the university website isn't clear on this.

Could you advise or point me to the right person?

Kind regards,
Amara Okafor
